subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-07-17 in New York
subcodes.first_line: You must always be happy. God is kind. He is more kind than a father. Whenever we experience unhappiness, we must turn our faces to God
subcodes.subjects: @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @consolation and comfort, @station of the Manifestation of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
